arts.ttl: ‘Flop market’ – Aston Villa part of club’s €130m+ transfer mess
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz had an impressive time at Aston Villa but his stint at Juventus is not going as planned. The Brazilian joined from the Birmingham club in the summer transfer window and has managed to play only 795 minutes in all competitions, having picked up injury problems as well. arts.ttl: Man Utd's Jim Ratcliffe reacts to Marcus Rashford's Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Aston Villa loanee Marcus Rashford has moved out of Manchester, United co-owner Jim Ratcliffe has confirmed. Marcus Rashford has settled well at Aston Villa after joining on loan from Manchester United

arts.ttl: Player ‘will let Aston Villa know’ of transfer desire – Knows what he wants
arts.sum: On Monday, journalist Toni Hernández said there’s uncertainty over whether €7.5m would be enough for Valencia to buy Aston Villa’s Enzo Barrenechea. The La Liga side must avoid relegation to stand a chance to take him permanently in the summer window. arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer setback after £17m decision
arts.sum: The 28-year-old joined the Bundesliga club on an initial loan deal until the end of the season after also penning a contract extension with Villa. Emi Buendia joined Bayer Leverkusen on loan from Aston Villa at the end of January

arts.ttl: Aston Villa lineup vs. Club Brugge: Predicted XI for Champions League last-16 second leg
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Aston Villa could line up for Tuesday's Champions League clash with Club Brugge.
